Uses of Class
heif.boxes.ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry

  • Packages that use ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry 
    Package Description
    heif.boxes
    Classes for parsing and representing individual HEIF-structured boxes.

    • Uses of ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry in heif.boxes

      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private java.util.List<ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry> ItemLocationBox.items 
      Methods in heif.boxes that return ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry ItemLocationBox.findItem(int itemID)
      Finds the location entry corresponding to the specified itemID.
      Methods in heif.boxes that return types with arguments of type ItemLocationBox.ItemLocationEntry

      Returns the list of all items.
